body:
## Health tick — 21:05 UTC

Sprint [ZAI-88](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-88) still ' + chr(96) + 'in_progress' + chr(96) + '. No agent ' + chr(96) + 'error' + chr(96) + ' state, no auto-recovery needed.

**Agents (4)**
- CEO — running
- CTO — running
- Localization Agent — paused (board-level, expected)
- Browser Tester Agent — running

**ZAI-88 active children**
- [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89) — ' + chr(96) + 'in_review' + chr(96) + ' on CEO (A5 i18n leaks). Fresh; handled separately.
- [ZAI-92](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-92) — ' + chr(96) + 'todo' + chr(96) + ' on Localization Agent. **On hold**, not stalled (assignee paused).
- [ZAI-95](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-95) — ' + chr(96) + 'in_progress' + chr(96) + ' on Localization Agent. **On hold**, not stalled (assignee paused).
- [ZAI-98](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-98) — duplicate health monitor task (older, stale). Tried to cancel but PATCH/POST/checkout all return 500. Leaving as-is; benign.

**Action**
- No state change required. Localization Agent remains paused per board; no children need unblocking until pause lifts.
- Next tick fires per routine schedule (or on event wake).
